components.value: V, S, M (a flask of unholy water or 5 pounds of powdered silver worth 25 gp)

description.value: This spell functions as holy ice weapon, except the weapon is made of frozen unholy water, and instead deals additional damage to creatures that are susceptible to unholy water.
